name: ★ ☆ 🍤Shrimpo -🍤 ☆ ★
description:
🌸Spring fever is here!!! 🌸

I wanted to make new bots for this month since my birthday is coming soon and I hadn’t made bots for a month

Had a fun time in NY but it’s time to make Shrimpo’s bots, saw his new skin in yesterday update, love it!!

Gonna make another Shrimpo for spring fever since it just started. Requests are open!!!

Requests ; REQUESTS!!!
